assertion_results.text: The remediation output describes the digest protocol for the upstream backport task: re-fetching the task description from Jira after create_issue and computing a SHA-256 digest using scripts/sha256-digest.py
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 81-113 of remediation.md describe the digest protocol for the upstream backport task (2.2.x): Step 1 re-fetches via jira.get_issue(<upstream-task-2.2-key>, fields=["description"]), Step 2 computes digest using 'python3 scripts/sha256-digest.py /tmp/task-desc.md'. Same protocol repeated for preemptive upstream (2.1.x) at lines 288-316.

assertion_results.text: The remediation output describes the digest protocol for the downstream propagation subtask: re-fetching the task description from Jira after create_issue and computing a SHA-256 digest using scripts/sha256-digest.py
assertion_results.evidence: Lines 172-208 describe the identical protocol for the downstream propagation subtask (2.2.x): re-fetch via jira.get_issue, then compute SHA-256 using scripts/sha256-digest.py. Repeated for preemptive downstream (2.1.x) at lines 380-416.

assertion_results.text: The remediation output includes the digest comment marker '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest:' in the described steps for each remediation task -- both upstream and downstream
assertion_results.evidence: The exact marker string '[sdlc-workflow] Description digest: <tagged-digest>' appears in all four task sections: upstream 2.2.x (line 103), downstream 2.2.x (line 190), upstream 2.1.x (line 306), downstream 2.1.x (line 398).

assertion_results.text: The remediation output sequences digest comments BEFORE issue links (Depend, Blocks) or other comments in the described procedure for each task
assertion_results.evidence: Each of the four task sections uses a numbered sequence where Step 3 posts the digest comment with text 'Post the digest comment BEFORE creating any issue links or other comments' and Step 4 begins 'Only after the digest comment is posted, proceed to create issue links' followed by jira.create_link calls. Consistent across all four tasks.

assertion_results.text: The remediation output specifies that the digest is computed from the re-fetched description (via Jira API after create_issue), not from the description string passed to create_issue
assertion_results.evidence: Line 85: 'Re-fetch the description from Jira (do NOT hash the string passed to create_issue -- Jira normalizes content during storage)'. Same parenthetical at lines 176, 292, 388. Summary at lines 425-426 and 432: 'Never hash the description string passed to create_issue -- always re-fetch from Jira after creation.'
